name: Hohsui Corporation
summary: Hohsui Corporation engages in the refrigerated warehouse storage and fisheries food business primarily in Japan. It is involved in the refrigeration and refrigeration storage of livestock, agricultural, and processed products. The company also produces, processes, and sells seafood products, such as shrimp, crab, frozen fish, and fish eggs; and procures, processes, and delivers thick egg, anko, and marine paste products. Hohsui Corporation was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Hohsui Corporation is a subsidiary of Chuo Gyorui Co., Ltd.
